title: wissadula rostrata var. zeylanica
intro: Wissadula rostrata var. zeylanica is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae and is commonly known as Ceylon rose mallow. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wissadula rostrata var. zeylanica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of this plant are made by drying the leaves and roots, and they can be consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
